DownloadForm.hintEmpty: Paste a link to get started
DownloadForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
DownloadForm.errorFfmpegFailed: FPS interpolation failed. Downloading original instead.
DownloadForm.fpsBoostText: FPS boosting to {fps} uses your device's browser to process the video, which can take longer to complete. If you close or refresh the page, processing will automatically resume on your next visit.
DownloadForm.addServerText: Enter the server UUID and a display label.
DownloadForm.deleteServerText: Are you sure you want to delete "{label}"? This will remove it from the database and your local list.
DownloadForm.installHint: Install the companion app on a PC or laptop (not a smartphone). After installation the UUID will be displayed — copy it here. Keep the computer on so video processing can run on it.
DownloadForm.duplicateText: This video has already been downloaded. What would you like to do?

TermsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
TermsPage.intro: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using Video Downloader. By using this application, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use.
TermsPage.s1Body: Video Downloader is a personal-use tool that enables you to download publicly available videos from supported platforms for your own private consumption. It is not intended for commercial redistribution, mass scraping, or any use that violates applicable laws or third-party rights.
TermsPage.s2Body: You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of this application complies with all applicable laws, regulations, and the terms of service of the platforms from which you download content. We do not monitor, control, or take responsibility for the content you download.
TermsPage.s3Body: Downloading a video does not transfer any copyright or ownership rights to you. You must respect the intellectual property rights of content creators and rights holders. Redistribution, public performance, or commercial use of downloaded content without proper authorization may constitute copyright infringement under applicable law.
TermsPage.s4Body: Most platforms — including YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and X (Twitter) — prohibit scraping or automated downloading in their Terms of Service. Violating a platform's ToS is a civil matter between you and that platform, not a criminal act in most jurisdictions. However, you use this application at your own risk and assume full responsibility for any ToS violations.
TermsPage.s5Body: This application uses yt-dlp, an open-source tool published under the Unlicense. yt-dlp is legal software. Courts in multiple jurisdictions have held that Terms of Service violations alone do not constitute illegal activity. Whether a specific download is lawful in your jurisdiction depends on local copyright law and the nature of the content.
TermsPage.s6Body: This application only downloads content from publicly accessible streams. It does not circumvent Digital Rights Management (DRM) or technical protection measures. Circumventing DRM may violate laws such as the DMCA § 1201 (United States), the EU Copyright Directive, or equivalent legislation in your country, and is not supported by this application.
TermsPage.s7Body: Downloaded media files are stored temporarily on the server and are associated only with your browser session. We do not collect, store, or share personally identifiable information. URLs you submit are used solely to perform the download you requested and are not retained after the session ends. Files are automatically purged after a period of inactivity.
TermsPage.s8Body: This application relies on third-party open-source tools including yt-dlp (Unlicense) and FFmpeg (LGPL/GPL). These tools are provided under their respective open-source licenses. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or responsible for these projects or their developers. Their availability and behavior may change at any time.
TermsPage.s9Body: This application is provided on a best-effort basis. Platform changes, network issues, or yt-dlp extractor updates may cause downloads to fail at any time without notice. We make no guarantees of availability, uptime, or compatibility with any specific URL or platform.
TermsPage.s10Body: This application is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. Your use of this application is entirely at your own risk.
TermsPage.s11Body: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this application, including but not limited to copyright claims, platform account suspensions, data loss, or any other harm resulting from downloaded content.
TermsPage.s12Body: We reserve the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the application after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. The date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.

VideoGrid.title: Downloads
VideoGrid.confirmDeleteText: This will remove the video from your downloads. This action cannot be undone.
VideoGrid.confirmConvertText: This will re-encode the video from H.265 to H.264 in your browser. The process may take a while depending on the video length and your device performance.
VideoGrid.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
VideoGrid.noResults: No videos match the current filters
VideoGrid.errorFfmpegFailed: FPS interpolation failed. Downloading original instead.
VideoGrid.errorBurnCaptionsFailed: Failed to burn captions into video.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsText: Subtitles will be permanently embedded into the video. Choose a position and style below.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsBorderStyleBoxHint: A solid filled rectangle is drawn behind the text. Maximum readability on any background.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsBorderStyleOutlineHint: Each character is surrounded by a colored border. Keeps the text clean without blocking the picture.
VideoGrid.deleteServerText: Are you sure you want to delete "{label}"? This will remove it from the database and your local list.
VideoGrid.addServerText: Enter the server UUID and a display label.
VideoGrid.installHint: Install the companion app on a PC or laptop (not a smartphone). After installation the UUID will be displayed — copy it here. Keep the computer on so video processing can run on it.
